test_focus: Advanced owner — expects precision; tests calibration upward (no dumbing down).
challenge: Whether to cut paid spend given CAC moving opposite to LTV trend
backstory: Former finance; uses CAC/LTV/payback language correctly. Panel should match fluency.
r3_wrong_claim: Our CAC payback is around 14 months right now. I'm thinking: shift 40 percent of paid into content — content compounds, paid doesn't. We ride out the LTV dip that way.
r4_contradiction: To be honest — the LTV number I gave you was SMB-only. We've been selling into an enterprise segment too; I'm separating them out next quarter. The blended LTV is probably materially higher. Probably changes the calc.

expected_answer_style.opening: References unit economics by name; no 'what is CAC' tutorials unless asked
